spec.title: System Status
spec.description: Aggregated status of Airlock Microgateway resources.

spec.title: Requests
spec.description: Total number of requests processed by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.expr:
round(sum(increase(envoy_vhost_route_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}",namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range]))+
sum(increase(microgateway_http_downstream_rq_threats_blocked_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range]) or on() vector(0)))

spec.title: % Blocked Requests
spec.description: Ratio of blocked requests vs. processed requests by Airlock Microgateway.

spec.expr:
sum(increase(microgateway_http_downstream_rq_threats_blocked_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range]) or on() vector(0))
/ 
(
sum(increase(envoy_vhost_route_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range]))
+
sum(increase(microgateway_http_downstream_rq_threats_blocked_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[$__range]) or on() vector(0))
)

spec.title: Requests vs. % Blocks
spec.description: Requests per second processed by Airlock Microgateway along with the corresponding block rate.

spec.expr:
sum(rate(envoy_vhost_route_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[1m]))
+
sum(rate(microgateway_http_downstream_rq_threats_blocked_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[1m]) or on() vector(0))

sum(rate(microgateway_http_downstream_rq_threats_blocked_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[1m]) or on() vector(0))
/
(
sum(rate(envoy_vhost_route_upstream_rq{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[1m]))
+
sum(rate(microgateway_http_downstream_rq_threats_blocked_total{managed_by=~"${operator:regex}", namespace=~"${namespace:regex}", gateway=~"${gateway_name:regex}", envoy_cluster_name=~`^service/.+`,envoy_route=~`${route:regex}`}[1m]) or on() vector(0))
)

spec.title: Blocked Threats by Block Type
spec.description: Threats blocked by Airlock Microgateway categorized by their corresponding block type.

spec.title: Application Downstream Latency
spec.description: Percentiles of the application downstream latency over one minute.

spec.title: Airlock Microgateway Processing Time
spec.description: Percentiles of the Airlock Microgateway processing time over one minute.

spec.name: operator
spec.label: Microgateway Operator
spec.description: Allows filtering on the managing operator instance.

spec.name: namespace
spec.label: Gateway Namespace
spec.description: Allows filtering on the namespaces in which gateways are deployed.

spec.name: gateway_name
spec.label: Gateway Name
spec.description: Allows filtering on specific gateway instance names within the selected namespaces.

spec.name: route
spec.label: Route
spec.description: Allows filtering request metrics of the selected Gateway instances on the name of their matching route.
